file.content:
}

Drag the probe to score each candidate. Drag c1's handle to change its length.

content.text:
Clean, no stray artifacts from the removal. The file is complete and correct.

DONE Built DotAlignment.svelte: an amber probe arrow (drag or arrow-key rotated, role="slider", 0-360deg) sweeping among four fixed periwinkle candidates (c1..c4 at 20/70/110/160deg), each with a proportional arrowhead and tip label; a spinbutton length handle on c1 (data-control="length-c1", 0.5-2x) stretches it along its fixed direction. Four lilac score bars below show live dot-product = length x cos(angle diff), one-decimal mono readouts, rising/falling/flipping sign with the probe and overtaking on length alone when c1 is stretched. Fixed a rounding bug (scores now show one decimal), removed a decorative dashed guide line that didn't correspond to actual bar positions, and bumped both drag handles to 46x46px for touch-target margin.

result:
Clean, no stray artifacts from the removal. The file is complete and correct.

DONE Built DotAlignment.svelte: an amber probe arrow (drag or arrow-key rotated, role="slider", 0-360deg) sweeping among four fixed periwinkle candidates (c1..c4 at 20/70/110/160deg), each with a proportional arrowhead and tip label; a spinbutton length handle on c1 (data-control="length-c1", 0.5-2x) stretches it along its fixed direction. Four lilac score bars below show live dot-product = length x cos(angle diff), one-decimal mono readouts, rising/falling/flipping sign with the probe and overtaking on length alone when c1 is stretched. Fixed a rounding bug (scores now show one decimal), removed a decorative dashed guide line that didn't correspond to actual bar positions, and bumped both drag handles to 46x46px for touch-target margin.
